queue_item.action: Prevent stale or foreign automation writers from overwriting shared repository state.

progress.finding: Require exact observed blob SHA equality before a shared-state replacement, independently enforce owner identity, and reject force as a retry strategy.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime; committed module was fetched and inspected after write.

handoff: Continuity Mining should define a merge policy for contradictory owned records. Cloudflare and Vercel workflow writers should use observed blob SHA preconditions and never force-update shared state after a conflict.
non_overwrite_statement: This append-only queue update records Frontier Research state without replacing ACTIVE_QUEUE.json or any peer-owned record.
